qa_pairs.question: Which desktop approach is recommended for graphical use of LS-PrePost?
qa_pairs.answer: The OnDemand desktop approach is recommended for graphically using LS-PrePost.

qa_pairs.question: How do users connect to an OnDemand system for graphical use?
qa_pairs.answer: Users connect to an OnDemand system by using one of the specified URLs in their laptop browser.

qa_pairs.question: What is the OnDemand URL for the NIBI cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: The OnDemand URL for the NIBI cluster is `https://ondemand.sharcnet.ca`.

qa_pairs.question: Where can one connect to the FIR OnDemand system?
qa_pairs.answer: One can connect to the FIR OnDemand system at `https://jupyterhub.fir.alliancecan.ca`.

qa_pairs.question: What is the URL for the RORQUAL OnDemand system?
qa_pairs.answer: The URL for the RORQUAL OnDemand system is `https://jupyterhub.rorqual.alliancecan.ca`.

qa_pairs.question: How can users access the TRILLIUM OnDemand system?
qa_pairs.answer: Users can access the TRILLIUM OnDemand system via `https://ondemand.scinet.utoronto.ca`.
